name: camchad-workout
description: CamChad Workout is a local-first camera-based movement analysis app.

scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w @camchad/web && npm run build -w @camchad/desktop
scripts.package:desktop: npm run build && npm run package:mac -w @camchad/desktop
scripts.clean: tsc -b --clean packages/pose-core packages/movement-core packages/activity-history packages/ui apps/web apps/desktop || true && rm -rf apps/*/dist apps/*/dist-electron apps/*/dist-types packages/*/dist apps/*/*.tsbuildinfo packages/*/*.tsbuildinfo coverage
scripts.validate: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test
